# terrible_community_general_gio_mime (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `handler` (String) Default handler set for the MIME type.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `mime_type` (String) MIME type for which a default handler is set.

### Read-Only

- `version` (String) Version of gio.
